@tbl-organism-resistance-rate presents organism-specific resistance rates, showing the proportion of each detected pathogen species that carries a given resistance marker.`r if (nzchar(ref_abr_table)) paste0(" While", ref_abr_table, " reports the rate of infections involving resistant pathogens, this table uses organism-level detections as the denominator.")` This distinction is clinically important: a high organism-specific resistance rate for a particular species may indicate local selective pressure, clonal spread, or gaps in antimicrobial stewardship targeting that organism.
